entity.summary: Aptos-based decentralized exchange using a vote-escrowed incentive model for liquidity and pool governance. Multiple source rows for Cellana and Cellana Finance are collapsed into this parent entity.
entity.notes: Duplicate source rows are collapsed under this parent entity. The official roadmap references mainnet launch activity in 2024, but this record leaves launch_date null because the review did not establish a precise launch marker.

evidence.title: Cellana Finance official website
evidence.notes: Official site identifies Cellana as a decentralized exchange on Aptos, links to the active application, and describes liquidity and governance features.

evidence.title: Cellana Finance exchange profile
evidence.notes: Exchange directory reference used to corroborate the parent DEX identity.
